expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: Supporting issue request and relation-map artifacts use `context_only_no_defect_analysis`, and the BCIN-7289 run includes per-issue plus aggregate summaries.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: runPhase phase1 post-validation checks these exact summary artifacts, so the output is phase-1 aligned.

uncertainties: Benchmark evidence is drawn from the current champion contract/runtime plus frozen fixtures rather than a fresh automated replay runner.
workarounds: Reused champion runtime artifacts where the frozen batch lacks a local full-run executor.
